invariants_acknowledged: Pure consumer-side refactor: public [article]/page.tsx reads the DB via trpc.helpArticle.getBySlug/getByCategory/getRelated; only API change is an additive sectionCount on getByCategory. All static DEFAULT_HELP_ARTICLES data usage removed from the page.

Closes the PG-181 DB->render contract (debt HELP-ARTICLE-EDITOR-BLOCK-RENDER-CONTRACT-001 + codex waiver 1811143672 retired): renderer routes tiptapDoc wrappers to the new pure-React tiptap-node-renderer.tsx, legacy ContentBlock[] to BlockRenderer, else section.content fallback.

Security (blocks is z.unknown() untrusted): no dangerouslySetInnerHTML; node/mark allowlist default->null; image/link scheme validation; runtime isRecord/array guards; per-variant legacy-block validation. SEC-T01..T12 negative tests.

A11y: single h1 (Tiptap headings offset to h3+), image alt always present + lazy + no-referrer, loading <output> role=status, error role=alert + retry, loop-until-unique heading-id dedup with section-N fallback.
Auth unchanged: route gated by the unchanged layout ModuleGate (tenant-scoped); IFC-302 changes data source only. No new route -> sitemap stays 211.
Categories remain static config; non-default-tenant help-article provisioning is a tracked follow-up (gh #533), not an IFC-302 defect.

kpi_results.kpi: Page renders from DB, no static imports, tests passing (DoD)

kpi_results.actual: page sources only trpc.helpArticle.* + static DEFAULT_HELP_CATEGORIES; asserted by a source-contract test; same UI incl. sectionCount chip

process_adherence.violation: NONE — the pipeline ran in the mandated order: /spec-session (5 Tier-A persona reviewers: frontend-lead, backend-architect, security-lead, a11y-expert, test-engineer) -> /plan-session with a REAL plan-reviewer subagent (verdict APPROVE-WITH-CHANGES; 3 ERROR + 4 WARN all applied) -> /exec. No spec/plan was hand-authored. The PG-181 BUILD-FIRST trap was avoided.
process_adherence.rule_going_forward: Continue invoking /spec-session -> /plan-session -> /exec in order; converge codex standalone before the full pre-ship; keep the candid session issues log.

notes: Independently verifiable: code at branch feat/ifc-302 (impl HEAD 5f9855c94; the attestation/context_ack commit follows). Full pre-ship PASS to be re-confirmed at the final committed SHA before push (gotcha #4). codex converged over 5 standalone rounds — 5 real findings fixed with tests, 3 false positives waived with source-anchored evidence (2 auth + 1 cross-task tenant-data). Follow-ups: gh #531 (server-side blocks validation), #532 (related waterfall), #533 (global/per-tenant built-in help provisioning) + debt-ledger entries. No Co-Authored-By trailer; no --no-verify; no destructive git. CSV flips to Completed on the MAIN control plane only after the PR merges (merge discipline). Session issues log: docs/operations/sprint-18-ifc-302-session-issues-log.md.
